---
title: "shaps"
author: "John Curtin"
date: "`r lubridate::today()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true 
    toc_depth: 2
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
params:
  version: "v4"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Set up environment
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)

theme_set(theme_classic()) 
source("https://github.com/jjcurtin/lab_support/blob/main/format_path.R?raw=true")

path_chtc <- format_path(str_c("llmpanel/chtc/train_", params$version))
path_configs <- format_path("llmpanel/data_processed")
```

## Best config 
```{r}
folds <- read_csv(here::here(path_chtc, "output",
                         str_c("batch_results_", params$version, ".csv")), 
              show_col_types = FALSE) |> 
  filter(feature_set == "pref") |> 
  glimpse()

best <- folds |>
  group_by(hp1, hp2, hp3) |>
  summarise(
    rsq = median(rsq),
    mae = median(mae),
    n = n(),
   .groups = "drop") |> 
  arrange(mae) |> 
  slice_head(n = 1)

best$algorithm <- "xgboost"
best$feature_set <- "pref"
```

Fit model to full dataset
```{r}
source(here::here(path_chtc, "input", "training_controls.R"))
d <- read_csv(here::here(path_chtc, "input", "data_trn.csv")) |> 
  glimpse()

d <- format_data(d)  
rec <- build_recipe(d = d, config = best)
rec_prep <- rec |> 
  prep(training = d)
feat <- rec_prep |> 
  bake(new_data = d)

model <- boost_tree(learn_rate = best$hp1,
                        tree_depth = best$hp2,
                        mtry = best$hp3,
                        trees = 500,  # set high but use early stopping
                        stop_iter = 20) |>  
      set_engine("xgboost",
                 validation = 0.2) |>  
      set_mode("regression") |> 
      fit(y ~ ., data = feat)


```



```{r}
preds <- d |> 
  group_by(subid) |> 
  slice_head(n = 1)

tones <- c("legitimizing", "self_efficacy", "norms", "value_affirmation", "acknowledging")
styles <- c("formal", "informal")

conds <- expand_grid(subid = unique(d$subid), tones, styles)

preds <- conds |> 
  left_join(preds, by = "subid")

feat_preds <- rec_prep |> 
  bake(new_data = preds) |> 
  mutate(tone = preds$tones,
         style = preds$styles,
         subid = preds$subid)

assign <- feat_preds |> 
  mutate(predicted  = predict(model, feat_preds)$.pred) |> 
  relocate(subid, tone, style, predicted)
```
